prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis on nitrobenzene was performed using the DFT method with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase. The calculation was executed with charge 0 and multiplicity 1, following the standard tier protocol. The most electrophilic site has an F+ value of 0.47317276 at atom index 3 (1-based index 4, symbol C).
